meta.title: GeoLeads - B2B Lead Generation Engine
meta.description: Find potential clients anywhere in the world. Smart lead extraction from Google Maps with CRM, WhatsApp and AI.
meta.keywords: leads, prospecting, google maps, business data, whatsapp, b2b, sales, lead generation

hero.title: Find ready-to-buy clients in minutes
hero.subtitle: Type a niche. Pick a city. GeoLeads finds businesses with phone, email, tax ID and social media validated — everything ready for you to reach out.
hero.footnote: No credit card · Free account · Instant activation

step1.title: Choose your niche
step1.desc: Gym, restaurant, accounting, clinic, pet shop — any segment. Type it and the city. The engine finds every business.

step2.title: Get ready leads
step2.desc: Name, phone, email, website, tax ID, Instagram and Facebook — everything you need to start selling. No typing required.

step3.title: Sell via WhatsApp
step3.desc: Send messages with one click or schedule automatic campaigns. The chatbot replies to unanswered leads.

phone.title: Phone & Website
phone.desc: Prioritize leads with available contact for immediate approach.

cnpj.title: Validated Tax ID
cnpj.desc: Enriches with official government data automatically.

email.title: Working Email
email.desc: Discovers institutional emails from the company's official website.

social.title: Social Media
social.desc: Instagram, Facebook and TikTok when available in public data.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Dispatch
whatsapp.desc: Assisted queue with ready templates and direct sending.

chatbot.title: Auto Chatbot
chatbot.desc: Automatically replies to leads with rules you define.

crm.title: Integrated CRM
crm.desc: Manage leads in stages (New, Contact, Proposal, Client).

export.title: CSV/Excel Export
export.desc: Export your leads to use anywhere.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to try?
faq.a1: No. You get 10 free tokens without a card. Later you can pay with credit card via Stripe.
faq.q2: Does it work in any city worldwide?
faq.a2: Yes. The engine scans Google Maps from any city or region you choose. Works in any country.
faq.a3: Yes. Data comes directly from Google Maps — name, phone, website, address. Enrichment looks up tax ID, email and social media from official sources.
faq.q4: Can I use it on mobile?
faq.a4: It works directly in the mobile browser. The dashboard is responsive and adapted for small screens.
faq.q5: What happens if I don't use all tokens in my plan?
faq.a5: Tokens are lifetime while your plan is active. Use them whenever you want, no rush.
faq.q6: Can I export leads to use in other tools?
faq.a6: Yes. You can export to CSV or Excel at any time.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: 10 free leads to test. No commitment. In 2 minutes you'll be extracting.
cta.login: Already have an account? Log in

footer.description: B2B lead extraction engine. Tax ID, email, WhatsApp and social media validated in one flow.

account.title: GeoLeads - My Account
account.error: Error loading data. Please try again.

1.title: 1. Data We Collect
1.text: We collect information you provide when creating an account, such as name, email and phone number. During platform use, we collect browsing data, extraction history and information about searched leads (public data extracted from Google Maps).

2.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
2.text: Your data is used to operate the platform, process payments, improve our services and send account-related communications. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

3.title: 3. Storage and Security
3.text: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption in transit and at rest. We maintain technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access.

4.title: 4. Third-Party Sharing
4.text: We only share data with payment processors (Stripe/Mercado Pago) and infrastructure services (Supabase, Railway). We do not share extracted lead data with third parties.

5.title: 5. Your Rights
5.text: You may request access, correction or deletion of your data at any time via our support email. We respond within 15 business days.

6.title: 6. Cookies
6.text: We use essential cookies for platform operation. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies without your consent.

7.title: 7. Data Retention
7.text: We keep your data while your account is active. After account deletion, data is removed within 90 days.

8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
8.text: We will notify material changes via email or dashboard notice. Continued use after changes implies acceptance.

1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.text: By creating an account and using GeoLeads, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

2.title: 2. Service Description
2.text: GeoLeads is a B2B lead extraction and enrichment platform using public data from Google Maps. Data provided comes from public sources and the user is responsible for use in accordance with applicable law.

3.title: 3. Accounts and Responsibility
3.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities on your account. Notify us immediately of unauthorized use.

4.title: 4. Tokens and Payments
4.text: Tokens are non-refundable usage credits, except where required by law. Payments are processed by Mercado Pago/Stripe. Plans auto-renew.

5.title: 5. Acceptable Use
5.text: You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes. Prohibited activities include: sending spam, violating data protection laws, or using data for illegal activities.

6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
6.text: GeoLeads does not guarantee absolute accuracy of extracted data, as it comes from public sources. The platform is provided 'as is', without guarantees of uninterrupted availability.

7.title: 7. Termination
7.text: You may cancel your account at any time. GeoLeads may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
8.text: The GeoLeads software, brand and design are the exclusive property of the company. Extracted data belongs to the user, subject to applicable laws.

9.title: 9. General Provisions
9.text: These terms are governed by Brazilian law. Questions: geoleads.pro@gmail.com

dashboard.heroSubtitle: Search, organize and approach B2B leads in minutes. One flow from Maps to WhatsApp.
dashboard.referralDesc: Share your link and earn 100 tokens for each friend who purchases any paid plan.
dashboard.referralAutoCredit: The bonus is automatically credited after your friend's payment is confirmed.

admin.title: Admin | GeoLeads
admin.noPermission: You do not have permission to access this page.

bot.welcome: Hi! I'm the automatic assistant. Tell me how I can help.
bot.fallback: I received your message. An attendant will continue here shortly.
bot.aiInstructions: You are a friendly and professional sales assistant. Help clients with questions about services, schedule meetings and collect contact information.

onboarding.step1Desc: Type a niche and a city. The engine scans Google Maps and finds all businesses in that segment with phone, address and ratings.
onboarding.step1Tip: 💡 Tip: The more specific the niche, the better the leads. Eg: 'Skin clinic in NYC' instead of just 'clinic'.
onboarding.step2Desc: Save found leads, add tags, notes and move through funnel stages: New → Contact → Proposal → Closed.
onboarding.step2Tip: 💡 Tip: Use stages to know exactly where each lead is in your sales process.
onboarding.step3Desc: Send batch messages with one click. The AI chatbot automatically replies to unanswered leads.
onboarding.step3Tip: 💡 Tip: Short and direct messages convert better. Personalize with the business name using {Nome}.
onboarding.step4Desc: Each extracted lead consumes 1 token. You start with 10 free tokens with no credit card. Plans from $9.90.
onboarding.step4Tip: 💡 Tip: Use free tokens to test your niche before investing.

extractor.filtersInfo: You only consume tokens for leads that have the selected item.
extractor.emptyDesc: Fill out the form or choose a quick template to find leads.
extractor.noResultsDesc: The engine didn't find businesses with this niche and city. Try more generic terms or another region.

crm.title: 📋 Your Sales CRM
crm.subtitle: Manage saved leads and move them through your sales funnel stages.
crm.importClick: Click to select a CSV file
crm.importHeaders: Expected headers: Name, Phone, Email, Instagram, Address, Category, Website
crm.importNoServer: The file is not saved on the server.
crm.importMapping: Map your file columns to CRM fields:

whatsapp.aiSubtitle: Generate new approaches and apply them to the dispatcher.
whatsapp.aiProduct: What do you sell? eg: traffic management
whatsapp.aiBenefit: Main benefit: eg: generate more quotes every month
whatsapp.queueDesc: Send messages manually to each lead with one click. You control the pace.
whatsapp.autoNext: Open next chat automatically after interval
whatsapp.botStatusDisconnected: WhatsApp disconnected. Connect the bot in the Auto-Reply tab.
whatsapp.blockWarningText: WhatsApp limits sending automation. Use with moderation. We recommend 20s+ pauses between sends and avoid more than 50 dispatches/day per number.
whatsapp.readyLeadsDesc: List with phone numbers extracted from your CRM.
whatsapp.emptyLeads: No leads with phone in CRM.
whatsapp.emptyLeadsDesc: Go to the Extractor, search with filters and save contacts to your CRM to release them here.
whatsapp.sendAndProceed: Send the message in WhatsApp, come back and proceed.

chatbot.leadCaptureDesc: New contacts automatically saved to CRM.
